text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF with Medicare Part A, B, C, and D, Version 2 │ May 2026 │ V 1.2 51 

RTI_RACE_CD 

LABEL: Research Triangle Institute (RTI) Race Code 

DESCRIPTION: Beneficiary race code (modified using RTI algorithm). Enhanced race/ethnicity designation based on 
first and last name algorithms. 

LONG NAME: RTI_RACE_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CMS Common Medicare Environment (CME) (derived) 

VALUES: 0 = Unknown 
1 = Non-Hispanic White
